jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.summary: Own product-facing React surfaces for a fast-moving student tools platform.
jobs.description: Northstar Labs is hiring a frontend engineer to ship polished dashboards, artifacts, and collaboration flows across its student productivity suite. The team wants someone comfortable with React, component architecture, and product iteration.
requirements: Strong CSS and component systems fluency
Comfort with API integration and product QA
Portfolio or shipped work that shows interface judgment
jobs.matchReason: Strong fit for a remote frontend profile with early-career React experience.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.summary: Build conversion-focused ecommerce tooling with a design-heavy product team.
jobs.description: Orbit Commerce is looking for a frontend developer who can turn product specs into resilient, responsive interfaces. You will work closely with design and growth teams on merchant-facing workflows.
requirements: Comfort collaborating with design and PM teams
Strong sense for polished interaction detail
jobs.matchReason: Close match for frontend candidates who want remote product work with design exposure.

jobs.title: UI Engineer
jobs.summary: Craft interface systems for operations teams working with cloud cost data.
jobs.description: Beacon Cloud needs a UI engineer to improve dense data products used by finance and infrastructure teams. The role mixes interaction design sensitivity with practical frontend execution.
requirements: Comfort with accessibility and responsive layouts
Experience with charts, data tables, or dashboards
Able to work from Bengaluru part of the week
jobs.matchReason: Strong option for candidates open to hybrid work and UI-heavy dashboard products.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Intern
jobs.summary: Support model evaluation and lightweight fine-tuning for applied AI workflows.
jobs.description: Helio AI is hiring a machine learning intern to support dataset preparation, model evaluation, and experiment tracking across applied LLM products. The team is open to candidates with strong Python fundamentals and no formal industry experience.
requirements: Understanding of notebooks, datasets, and model evaluation
Able to communicate experimental findings clearly
Interest in LLM tooling or applied AI products
jobs.matchReason: Excellent match for an ML intern profile with Python skills and limited formal experience.

jobs.title: AI Research Engineering Intern
jobs.summary: Pair with research engineers on evaluation pipelines and data tooling.
jobs.description: Cinder Labs is expanding its applied research team and needs an intern to support prompt experiments, evaluation dashboards, and training data hygiene. This is a good role for a Python-first student who wants hands-on AI exposure.
requirements: Comfort with data cleaning and scripting
Ability to read and summarize technical papers
Open to working from Pune twice a week
jobs.matchReason: Good match for ML-leaning candidates who want research-adjacent internship work.

jobs.title: Data Science Intern
jobs.summary: Work on healthcare modeling, metrics, and experiment reporting.
jobs.description: Verve Health is looking for a data science intern to build analysis notebooks, validate models, and support reporting for patient engagement initiatives. The team values clear reasoning and practical Python skills.
requirements: Interest in healthcare or social impact products
jobs.matchReason: Useful option for Python-first candidates exploring analytical ML-adjacent work.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.summary: Own roadmap execution for workflow automation products serving revenue teams.
jobs.description: Meridian Stack needs a product manager to drive discovery, prioritize roadmap decisions, and partner tightly with sales, design, and engineering across a B2B SaaS platform. The role expects prior product ownership experience.
jobs.matchReason: Top fit for a PM profile with B2B SaaS experience and a few years of ownership.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.summary: Lead platform bets around invoicing, usage pricing, and account growth.
jobs.description: Atlas Billing is expanding its product team and wants a product manager who can move comfortably between merchant pain points, product analytics, and engineering execution. Billing and growth product experience are helpful.
requirements: Experience with platform or B2B workflows
Ability to run discovery and define metrics
Comfort with hybrid collaboration in London
jobs.matchReason: Good fit for B2B SaaS PM candidates willing to work hybrid in a payments domain.

jobs.title: Product Operations Manager
jobs.summary: Shape planning rituals, product analytics loops, and cross-functional execution cadences.
jobs.description: Threadline is hiring a product operations manager to build the systems behind efficient product delivery. You will work across PM, design, and GTM teams to tighten planning, metrics review, and roadmap communication.
requirements: 3+ years in product ops, PM, or strategy
Comfort with product metrics and planning systems
jobs.matchReason: Strong adjacent fit for PM candidates who also like systems and execution design.

jobs.title: Associate Product Manager
jobs.summary: Partner with senior PMs on analytics tooling used by SaaS finance teams.
jobs.description: Pilot Metrics is hiring an associate product manager to support feature definition, user research, and KPI tracking. This role works well for candidates with some product or operations experience who want broader ownership.
requirements: 2+ years in product, analytics, or operations roles
Comfort with dashboards and stakeholder interviews
Interest in B2B SaaS customer workflows
jobs.matchReason: Useful PM-adjacent path for candidates with less direct PM title experience.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.summary: Design backend services and integrations for developer-facing products.
jobs.description: Granite API is hiring a backend engineer to build stable services, partner integrations, and data pipelines. The team wants someone comfortable with JavaScript or TypeScript on the server and a product-minded attitude.
requirements: Experience with Node.js or TypeScript backends
Comfort with API design and observability
Able to work in a distributed team
jobs.matchReason: Useful match for candidates who pivot from frontend into broader full-stack work.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.summary: Build user-facing product surfaces and the services behind them.
jobs.description: Quarry OS is looking for a full stack engineer who can move between React interfaces and Node.js services. The role supports internal workflow products and customer-facing reporting features.
requirements: Comfort with REST APIs and databases
Able to work from Hyderabad on a hybrid cadence
jobs.matchReason: Strong adjacent role if the candidate wants broader product ownership beyond frontend.

jobs.title: Product Analyst
jobs.summary: Drive product insights and experiment analysis for a B2B SaaS reporting product.
jobs.description: Kite Ledger is hiring a product analyst to shape experimentation, dashboarding, and customer behavior analysis across its reporting suite. The role is strong for analytical PM-adjacent candidates.
requirements: Experience with product or business analysis
jobs.matchReason: Good fit for candidates whose PM background is heavy on analytics and product decisions.

jobs.title: Technical Program Manager
jobs.summary: Run delivery coordination across platform, analytics, and customer systems teams.
jobs.description: Signal Foundry is hiring a technical program manager to strengthen planning and execution across several product squads. This is useful for product candidates who have deep cross-functional delivery experience.
requirements: Able to define clear delivery operating rhythms
jobs.matchReason: Relevant adjacent path for PM candidates with strong execution leadership.

jobs.title: Junior Frontend Engineer
jobs.summary: Help a small product team refine user-facing collaboration interfaces.
jobs.description: Papertrail Studio is hiring a junior frontend engineer to help improve collaboration views, templates, and in-app editing. The team values shipping discipline, visual polish, and clear ownership.
requirements: Comfort with product QA and iterative releases
Portfolio that shows attention to detail
jobs.matchReason: Excellent fit for early-career frontend candidates with around one year of experience.

jobs.title: Software Engineering Intern
jobs.summary: Support tooling and internal dashboards for robotics workflows.
jobs.description: Summit Robotics is hiring a software engineering intern to work on internal applications, telemetry tools, and experiment support for its robotics team. The team is open to candidates with strong fundamentals and high learning velocity.
requirements: Able to learn quickly in a hardware-adjacent environment
Open to on-site work in Chennai
jobs.matchReason: Good stretch opportunity for candidates open to on-site work and broader engineering exposure.

jobs.title: Growth Product Manager
jobs.summary: Lead activation, monetization, and expansion experiments for a CRM platform.
jobs.description: Ribbon CRM is looking for a growth product manager who can shape acquisition-to-expansion loops across its sales software. This role requires strong metric ownership, experimentation judgment, and customer empathy.
requirements: 3+ years in product or growth roles
jobs.matchReason: Very strong match for a PM profile with B2B SaaS and growth-oriented experience.

jobs.title: Associate AI Engineer
jobs.summary: Ship evaluation and orchestration tooling for LLM-powered enterprise workflows.
jobs.description: Nova Reasoning is hiring an associate AI engineer to help productionize evaluation loops, prompt systems, and workflow automation around LLM products. The team wants strong Python skills and product-minded execution.
jobs.matchReason: Strong option for ML-oriented candidates aiming for applied AI roles beyond internships.

jobs.title: Platform Product Manager
jobs.summary: Own internal platform capabilities that power admin and workflow teams.
jobs.description: Forge Admin wants a platform product manager to partner with infrastructure and product teams on internal tooling, APIs, and operational leverage. This role suits PMs who like enabling other teams at scale.
requirements: Experience with APIs, platforms, or internal tools
Able to work hybrid in San Francisco
jobs.matchReason: Good fit for experienced PM candidates who want platform ownership in SaaS.

jobs.title: Founding Product Manager
jobs.summary: Join an early-stage B2B SaaS team and define the operating rhythm for product.
jobs.description: Delta Harbor is hiring a founding product manager to work directly with the founders on discovery, roadmap decisions, and customer feedback loops. The role expects strong ownership and comfort with ambiguity.
requirements: 3+ years in product, founder, or startup operator roles
Ability to turn loose inputs into clear priorities
jobs.matchReason: Excellent fit for candidates aiming at startup-style product ownership in SaaS.
